comment.body:
$SPX Cheat Card — Mon 9/29 (EM = ±15 off 6655 → 6670/6640; ladder 6680 → 6625)

Top → Bottom (ladder)
📦 6680 — CHOP LID
🧱 6675 — CCS node (wall)
⏸ 6670 — EM TOP stall
🧲 6655 — Drift level / EM center
📦 6650 — CHOP FLOOR
⏸ 6645 — retest band
🧱 6640 — EM BOTTOM guardrail
⏸ 6635 — mid band
🧱 6625 — systemic zone (legacy magnet)

Quick-IF
• Above 6680: first touch = stall; only continue if vol stays quiet.
• Inside EM band (6670–6640): fade edges; use 6655 magnet for rotations; reclaim 6650/67 → re-test lid.
• Below 6640: 6635 → 6625 opens only on vol expansion; otherwise expect bounce attempts back into the band.

Anybody have any idea what these could be? 

The federal building (fed court/fbi/etc) keeps loading them into the courtyard at night… the crane takes up the street so it’s all blocked off for over a week now, but, they dismantle/take it down during the day… so during the day it looks like they r working on the road… 

Super shady lol
